title: Phylohydrax madagascariensis
taxonomy: Phylohydrax madagascariensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus Phylohydrax was previously classified under the genus Spermacoce. Phylohydrax madagascariensis is native to Madagascar and is a type of succulent shrub. Further research is needed to fully understand its classification and taxonomic relationships. It is often found in dry and rocky areas, and is adapted to survive in arid environments.
